hero.description: Senior Video Engineer with 10+ years in real-time video systems, immersive environments, and large-scale live productions. Core expertise in disguise (d3) — certified trainer.

about.paragraph1: I'm Yuri Stranyov — Freelance Video Engineer and VJ based in Dubai. Over 10 years I've designed, built, and operated real-time video systems for some of the world's most demanding live productions — from F1 concerts and world championship ceremonies to immersive installations seen by millions.
about.paragraph2: My core tool is disguise (d3). I work across the full production cycle: system architecture, multi-server pipelines with full redundancy, projection calculations, content mapping, and on-site technical leadership under live conditions. disguise Certified Trainer.
about.paragraph3: Available for freelance engagements worldwide — live events, touring, XR stages, immersive environments, and permanent installations. Currently based in Dubai, open to travel.
